content:
# Short Offset

**Summary**: The assumption that seismic waves travel over a short distance relative to the depth of investigation, simplifying velocity calculations.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018]] evaluated the impact of the short-offset assumption on velocity determination.

## Scientific Context

- [[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018]] Used to simplify NMO and RMS velocity calculations in seismic processing.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018]] Comparing results from a restricted offset range (under 180m) vs. full data range.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The study found no significant difference in accuracy between long and short offset cases for the Biyadh formation. ([[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018, p. 49]])
